zh.Portmoak, Kinross-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭金洛-爾波特莫亞可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto於1394年出生時，她的父親Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie22歲，母親Mariotta Glen23歲。她和John Arnot of Arnot至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1480年享年86歲。

zh-hans.Portmoak, Kinross-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰金洛-爾波特莫亞可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto于1394年出生时，她的父亲Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie22岁，母亲Mariotta Glen23岁。她和John Arnot of Arnot至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1480年享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Beuzeville-la-Giffard in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the ancient Germanic personal name Boso + ville ‘settlement’. The final element has been altered as a result of association with the common placename ending -well ‘spring, stream’. Some instances of Bovill may have the same origin.

variants.name: Buswell
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Boswell  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Bovill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy whose medieval forms share a similar range of variants, such as Bouville (Seine-Maritime), any of several places called Biéville (Calvados, Manche) or Biville (Manche, Seine-Maritime), Beuzeville-la-Giffard (Seine-Maritime), Boiville (Orne), and perhaps Boudeville (Seine-Maritime). See also   Boswell   and   Beville  .

variants.name: Biswell
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire): possibly from a lost or unidentified place called with Old English bēos ‘coarse grass’ + wella ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, a variant of Boswell .

variants.name: Bussell
meanings: English: variant of   Boswell   (of Norman origin) or   Bissell   1.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto was born in 1394, her father, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, was 22 and her mother, Mariotta Glen, was 23. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with John Arnot of Arnot. She died in 1480, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto est née en 1394, son père, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mariotta Glen, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec John Arnot of Arnot. Elle est décédée en 1480, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto 1394 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie 22 und ihre Mutter Mariotta Glen 23. Sie hatte mit John Arnot of Arnot mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1480 im Alter von 86 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto è nata il nel 1394, sua padre, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mariotta Glen, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con John Arnot of Arnot. Morì nel 1480, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Boswell of Balmutoが1394年に生まれた時，父Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregieは22歳，母Mariotta Glenは23歳であった。彼女はJohn Arnot of Arnotとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1480年に86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto(이)가 1394년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mariotta Glen(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 John Arnot of Arnot(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto nasceu em 1394, seu pai, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mariotta Glen, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com John Arnot of Arnot. Ela faleceu em 1480, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto родилась в 1394 г., её отцу по имени Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mariotta Glen, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от John Arnot of Arnot. Она умерла в 1480 г. в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto nació en 1394, su papá, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mariotta Glen, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con John Arnot of Arnot. Murió en 1480, a la edad de 86 años.
